title: impatiens textorii var. koreana
intro: Impatiens textorii var. koreana, also known as Korean Balsam, is a plant species in the balsam family (Impatiens) native to East Asia, particularly in China, Korea, and Japan. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Impatiens textorii var. koreana include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture to treat various ailments, and its flowers are also used to make a medicinal oil.
